items.title: Double Top QQQ Euphoria Is Likely Ending
items.description: Stock market insights: Double top patterns, QQQ risks, and choppy trends may signal a bear market. Read here for insights on the market.

items.title: Latin American e-commerce co MercadoLibre slips after Q2 profit misses
items.description: Investing.com -- Shares of MercadoLibre (NASDAQ:MELI) slipped 3% in after-hours trading on Monday after the Latin American e-commerce company posted second-quarter earnings that fell well short of Wall Street expectations, even as revenue came in ahead of estimates.

items.title: Weave Names Abhi Sharma as Chief Technology Officer
items.description: LEHI, Utah, August 04, 2025--Weave (NYSE: WEAV), a leading all-in-one customer experience and payments software platform for small and medium-sized healthcare businesses, today announced the appointment of Abhi Sharma as the company’s Chief Technology Officer (CTO).

items.title: Sector Update: Consumer Stocks Higher Late Afternoon
items.description: Consumer stocks rose late Monday afternoon, with the Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLP)

items.title: Symbotic Inc. (SYM): A Bull Case Theory
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on Symbotic Inc. on Valueinvesting subreddit by jackandjillonthehill. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on SYM. Symbotic Inc.’s share was trading at $53.08 as of July 28th. SYM’s forward P/E was 263.16 according to Yahoo Finance. Symbotic (SYM), an industrial robotics company, is in a rapid growth […]
